end local function K(K)return q[K+(186688-174103)]end do local K=math.floor local T=string.sub local B=type local H=string.len local v=q local L=table.concat local Y=string.char local return(function(q,B,H,v,L,Y,Q,d,E,Z,M,i,O,k,R,r,z,o,J,T,t,g,C)d,o,z,k,t,r,C,T,M,R,g,E,Z,O,i,J=function(q,K)local B=Z(K)local H=function(...)return T(q,{...},K,B)end return H
